title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 260.915 - Registration of dry-cleaning facilities with department
text:
260.915.  Registration of dry-cleaning facilities with department. — Each operator of an active dry-cleaning facility shall register with the department on a form provided by the department according to procedures established by the department by rule.
(L. 2000 S.B. 577) 
Expires 8-28-17; see § 260.965
